---
name: Larger proposal / repo-boundary discussion
about: Start a broader discussion about direction, scope, or public-private boundary
title: "[proposal] "
labels: ["discussion"]
assignees: []
---

## Proposal summary

Describe the larger idea in a few sentences.

## Why do you think this matters now?

What problem does it solve, or what opportunity does it open?

## Does this stay within the public sidecar boundary?

Please explain whether this idea keeps Agent Preflight:

- lightweight
- runtime-agnostic
- easy to demo
- easy to fork
- clearly separate from the private Branching Agent OS core

If not, say which boundary it pressures.

## What would the smallest useful version look like?

Try to describe the smallest version that could be discussed or tested publicly.

## What should not be pulled into this repo?

Call out any parts that may belong in the private BAOS core rather than the public sidecar repo.

## Optional extra context

Related docs, screenshots, prior discussion, or example repos.
